Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Deconstruct and Analyze Each Interview Goal Extract activities triggers roles decisions artifacts and exceptions from each source

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Mary AP Clerk Trigger Invoice arrives usually email Task Check for valid PO number Decision Has PO No Send back to supplier for details Yes Log into accounting system Task Forward to Purchasing to confirm receipt Task Match invoice line items against PO in system after confirmation Decision Match No Email purchasing team to clarify Note Escalate to supervisor if discrepancy cant be resolved easily Yes Send to department manager for approval Trigger System sends automatic email for manager sign off Task Schedule for payment after manager approval Artifacts Invoice PO Accounting System Email

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Dan Purchasing Officer Trigger Invoice from AP inbox Task Check invoice details vs PO quantities prices delivery charges Decision Correct No Contact supplier directly OR ask AP to hold until corrected version Note If PO missing tell Mary to get info Never approve without PO reference Yes Send confirmation email back to AP Assumption After confirmation AP moves to manager for final approval Assumption After approval AP schedules payment Artifacts PO Invoice Email

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Carlos Department Manager Trigger Notification System shows invoice details PO and confirmation Task Review details quantities pricing special notes Decision Looks good Yes Hit approve in system No Reject or ask Mary to hold investigate Assumption After approval goes back to AP for payment cycle Artifacts System notification Invoice PO

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Rita AP Supervisor Role Exceptions Trigger Mary cant match OR Purchasing has issue missing info unresolvable discrepancy Task Contact suppliers OR coordinate between departments Scenario Invoices without PO informal services Task Work with dept heads to create retrospective PO OR decide to reject Flow After exception resolution goes back to normal flow Purchasing confirmation Manager approval Payment Artifacts Exception cases Retrospective PO

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Karen Supplier Relationship Manager Role Indirect disputes terms Trigger AP Purchasing finds mismatch vs agreed terms OR missing PO Task Contact supplier Task Check contract for correct price Action Inform AP Purchasing Artifacts Contracts

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Conflict Refinement Mary says Email purchasing team to clarify on discrepancy Dan says Contact supplier directly Consolidation Purchasing contacts Supplier or coordinates with AP

Text: Best Model Purchasing contacts Supplier If Supplier sends corrected Supplier AP Purchasing Or Purchasing AP hold Supplier AP Purchasing Lets use a loop Purchasing identifies issue Contact Supplier Supplier sends correction AP receives correction Purchasing re verifies

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Exception Handling Mary mentions escalation to Rita Rita mentions handling unresolvable discrepancies Integration If Purchasing AP cant resolve escalate to Rita Rita coordinates If retro PO needed Rita works with Dept Head Add Create Retro PO task for Rita Dept Head

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Karens Role Karen helps with pricing discrepancies based on contract Integration This likely happens during Purchasing verification or AP matching Add a sub process or call node for Resolve Pricing Discrepancy involving Karen

Text: Match Success Purchasing sends confirmation to AP AP Task Match line items in system Mary mentions this Dan implies it by checking details AP Task Request Manager Approval System trigger Manager Task Review Invoice PO Confirmation Gateway Approved No Manager rejects or asks AP to investigate Loop Manager AP Investigate Yes Manager approves in system AP Task Schedule Payment End Payment Scheduled

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Address Conflicts and Ambiguities Conflict Mary says Email purchasing team to clarify on discrepancy Dan says Contact supplier directly Resolution Purchasing has the authority to contact supplier but may loop through AP The model should show Purchasing contacting Supplier potentially via AP

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Conflict Mary says Forward to purchasing to confirm receipt Dan says Check invoice details line up Resolution Purchasing checks details and implies receipt confirmation is part of the match or a prerequisite Rita mentions Purchasing confirmation The flow holds AP Purchasing Verify and Confirm AP

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ambiguity Manager approval trigger Mary says System sends automatic email Carlos says System shows details hit approve Resolution System notification triggers Manager task

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ambiguity Rita mentions Retrospective PO Carlos doesnt mention this Resolution Ritas exception path includes creating a retro PO This is a valid variation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ambiguity Karens involvement Resolution Karen is an advisory role for disputes Can be modeled as a service task or call activity during discrepancy resolution

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Format the Output Structure Process Summary High level overview Roles Pools List of participants BPMN Elements Start End Events Tasks Categorized by lane Gateways Decisions Sequence Flows Step by step description Artifacts Data objects Exceptions Variations Explicit section for loops and escalations Ambiguities Notes Where interviews conflicted or were vague
